Title: Create cipher CLI entry script
Body: Create the main CLI entrypoint script for the cipher project (ciphercli.py). It should support --help, --version, and command routing.

Title: Set up project structure and dependencies
Body: Initialize Python package structure, create .venv, requirements.txt, and basic folder layout for the cipher project.

Title: Implement core cipher functions
Body: Implement core encryption and decryption functions, handle input string sanitization, padding, and exclude character options.

Title: Add CLI options for encryption/decryption
Body: Add --type E|D and --message options to the CLI, with input validation and error messages.

Title: Build Playfair cipher engine
Body: Implement Playfair cipher 5x5 grid generation, handling double letters, padding, and grid rules.

Title: Integrate Playfair cipher with CLI
Body: Connect Playfair cipher logic to ciphercli.py so users can encrypt/decrypt messages from the command line.

Title: File input/output support
Body: Add CLI options to read messages from a file and write results to a file.

Title: Support --output all|message flag
Body: Implement output option to show either just the encrypted/decrypted message or the full output with grid and message.

Title: Write unit tests for cipher logic
Body: Create unit tests covering core cipher functions, Playfair grid generation, padding, and double-letter handling.

Title: Test CLI integration and file I/O
Body: Write tests for command-line interface, file reading/writing, and --output flag functionality.

Title: Add project README and usage examples
Body: Write README.md with project description, installation instructions, and usage examples for family/friends.

Title: Add example messages and tutorial
Body: Provide example messages and step-by-step usage guide in README.md and/or USAGE.md files.

Title: Add optional ciphers (Caesar
Labels: Implement optional ciphers for batch testing and fun variations in addition to Playfair.

Title: Add interactive CLI mode
Body: Create an interactive CLI mode where users can choose cipher type, input, and options in a menu-driven interface.
